description: Style Note This mid-rise bikini from facit is crafted using the best jersey knit, that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The bikini provides a smooth Fit without binding, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort. Product Details Blue trophy bikini brief that has a high cut for free leg movement, wide and comfortable fabric covered waistband that provides super soft, smooth and comfortable grip with printed branding for abrasion free comfort Material and Care 100% premium cotton Machine wash warm at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
